company.description:
# Venture Global | Innovating to provide low-cost LNG

## Calcasieu Pass

We are constructing and commissioning a liquefied natural gas (LNG) liquefaction and export facility in Cameron Parish, Louisiana, south of the city of Lake Charles. Once complete, the plant is expected to have an export capacity of least 10 MTPA.

## Plaquemines​

We are constructing an LNG liquefaction and export facility in Plaquemines Parish, Louisiana, approximately 20 miles south of New Orleans. Once complete, Plaquemines LNG is expected to have an export capacity of at least 20 MTPA.

## CP2 LNG​

We are in an advanced stage of engineering with major procurement work underway for the CP2 LNG Project in Cameron Parish, Louisiana. The project site is nearby Calcasieu Pass and, once complete, CP2 LNG is expected to have an export capacity of at least 20 MTPA.

## CP3 LNG

We are developing the CP3 LNG Project in Cameron Parish, Louisiana. The project site is nearby the Calcasieu Project and the CP2 Project and, once complete, CP3 LNG is expected to have an export capacity of at least 30 MTPA.

![](https://ventureglobal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/VG-gulf-02_NO-DELTA-scaled.png)

![](https://ventureglobal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/VG-gulf-01_MOBILE_NO-DELTA-scaled.png)

company.description:
# Architecture, engineering and consultancy - Ramboll

Ramboll is a global engineering, architecture and consultancy company with more than 18,000 experts that create sustainable solutions for governments and companies all over the world.

We combine insights with the power to drive positive change to our clients, in the form of ideas that can be realised and implemented.

**We call it: Bright ideas. Sustainable change.**
